summary.key_theme: 受宏觀經濟通膨壓力與近期財報後股價疲軟影響，市場對 WMG 的投資信心持續承壓。

bearish.title: Warner Music Group (WMG): Buy, Sell, or Hold Post Q4 Earnings? — Over the past six months, Warner Music Group’s stock price fell to $27.57. Shareholders have lost 17.4% of their capital
bearish.reason: 該報導指出 WMG 在 Q4 財報後股價表現疲軟，過去六個月內股價跌至 27.57 美元，導致股東資本損失達 17.4%，反映出市場對其獲利能力或成長前景的擔憂。

bearish.title: Offerpad, Gray Television, Warner Music Group, and AMC Entertainment Stocks Trade Down, What You Need To Know — A number of stocks fell in the afternoon session after a combination of hot inflation data and geopolitical turmoil
bearish.reason: 受宏觀經濟因素影響，包括高於預期的通膨數據與地緣政治動盪，導致 WMG 與其他多檔股票在午後交易時段同步下跌，顯示系統性風險對股價造成壓抑。
